allow: PowerShell($health = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/health" -Method Get; Write-Output "HEALTH: $\($health | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $users = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/users" -Method Get; Write-Output "USERS: $\($users | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)"; $teachers = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/teachers" -Method Get; Write-Output "TEACHERS: $\($teachers | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)")

PowerShell(try { $body = @{ firstname = "Test"; lastname = "User"; email = "test-$\(Get-Random\)@example.com"; role = "student" } | ConvertTo-Json; $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "http://localhost:3000/users" -Method Post -Body $body -ContentType "application/json"; Write-Output "POST OK: $\($r | ConvertTo-Json -Compress\)" } catch { $resp = $_.ErrorDetails.Message; Write-Output "POST FAILED \($\($_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)\): $resp" })
